summary:
Fixed the bug: the CSV reader was hard-coded to ISO-8859-1, corrupting any non-ASCII characters.  
Solution implemented in app/CsvReader.java:

1. Added import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
2. Replaced
   Charset.forName("ISO-8859-1")
   with
   StandardCharsets.UTF_8
   and updated the comment accordingly.

Running test.sh now rebuilds, executes, and all international names pass verification.
